reason: Widget structure conventions (const, MD3 surfaces, no unnecessary Container, prop ordering, build method shape). Required for the new StitchVerticalImageList + _StitchVerticalImageRow widgets and the screen-level edit in stitch_editor_screen.dart. Also covers a11y testing patterns for the new × IconButton / drag-indicator semantics.

Authoritative source for WindowSizeClass dispatch, side panel width clamp(380, ×0.25, 480), Sheet→Panel dual-form extraction, and the rule that side panel content MUST self-wrap in SingleChildScrollView. The new layout switches the side panel from a single SingleChildScrollView(panel) to Column(Expanded(list), Expanded(SingleChildScrollView(panel))) — both Expanded slots need their own internal scroll. The responsive behavior table for stitch_editor must be updated as part of this task (AC-9).

Riverpod patterns for ConsumerStatefulWidget / ConsumerWidget subscriptions. The new StitchVerticalImageList watches stitchEditorControllerProvider and calls notifier methods (reorder / removeImage / clear / addFromGallery / pasteFromClipboard) — must follow the existing one-watch-per-build, read-notifier-on-callback pattern used by StitchImageStrip.

Lint + test bar — verify `dart format .` / `flutter analyze` / `flutter test` all pass (AC-11), that new widget tests cover AC-1..AC-7 (wide-screen layout swap, vertical reorder, empty-state CTA, header-no-collapse, narrow-screen unchanged), and that no existing tests under test/features/long_stitch/** regress.

Exhaustive enum dispatch for WindowSizeClass. The screen's useSidePanel computation already groups expanded || large; the new layout must continue to handle all four buckets exhaustively (compact / medium unchanged, expanded / large switch to the new side-panel-with-list structure). No magic-number width checks introduced.
